title: Raw Input
body:
# Raw Input Mod

### Description
Use raw input on Minecraft 1.12.2 . Can make mouse input feel smoother and fix mouse jittering.

### Usage
/rawinput - Toggles the raw input. \
/rescan - Rescans for a mouse - Use if mouse input is not working.

Both commands have keybinds that are unbound by default.
### Credit
Fork of https://github.com/Fluorides/RawInputMod1.12.2, which is a fork of https://github.com/xCuri0/RawInputMod.
